_comment: Edit this file to update your company's naming convention rules. No code changes needed.
name_case: ALL UPPERCASE — every character in every field must be uppercase

Mini set.rule: MUST END WITH 'MINI SET' AND ALL CHARACTERS MUST BE IN UPPER CASE
examples: JPG LE MALE EDT 4 X 7ML MINI SET
DIOR SAUVAGE EDT 3 X 10ML MINI SET
AB HER GOLDEN SECRET EDT 80ML TESTER

Giftset — Same Fragrance.rule: Do NOT use word 'giftset' or 'gift set' in name — only expand component sizes with +
Giftset — Same Fragrance.size_format: must list all component sizes separated by + after the fragrance name

Giftset — Different Fragrances.rule: Do NOT use word 'giftset' or 'gift set' in name — component structure requires short fragrance name + size
Giftset — Different Fragrances.size_format: must list each distinct component separated by +
examples: CH 212 M EDT 100ML + CH 212 W EDP 75ML
D&G LIGHT BLUE M EDT 75ML + D&G LIGHT BLUE W EDT 50ML

size_format: Numeric followed by ML — e.g. 100ML, 50ML, 75ML, 200ML. Always uppercase.
capitalization: ALL fields must be UPPERCASE — brand, fragrance name, type, size, suffix

common_abbreviations._comment: Derived strictly from target validation key reference 'image_30ab3d.png'

remark_codes.OK: Entry is correct, no changes needed
remark_codes.Name corrected: Brand or fragrance name was wrong or lowercase
remark_codes.Type corrected: X→Y: EDP/EDT type was wrong — e.g. Type corrected: EDT→EDP
remark_codes.Size corrected: XML→YML: Size/quantity was wrong or missing ML — e.g. Size corrected: 100ML→50ML
remark_codes.Gender added: Gender was missing and has been determined from source
remark_codes.Vial name corrected: Vial name does not end with 'VIAL'
remark_codes.Vial size invalid: Vial size must be less than 5ML
remark_codes.Mini name corrected: Mini name does not end with 'MINI'
remark_codes.Mini size invalid: Mini size must be between 5ML and 12ML
remark_codes.Mini set name corrected: Mini set name did not end with 'MINI SET'
remark_codes.Tester name corrected: Tester name does not end with 'TESTER'
remark_codes.Giftset format corrected: Giftset must remove 'giftset/gift set' and list component sizes with + (e.g., 100ML + 50ML)
remark_codes.Not found — manual review: Product could not be verified online
